goalDescription: Complete sin-brain CLI/MCP, Preview MCP, Auto-Sync hooks, Neural-Bus integration

rules: Images MUST be opened in macOS Preview.app — never tell users to check /tmp (PRIORITY -4.5)
Auto-sync after every chat turn via sync-chat-turn hook (PRIORITY -4.0)
Neural-Bus is central message bus for all A2A agents
solutions: sin-brain MCP (src/mcp/sin-brain-server.mjs) with add_rule, sync_brain, open_image_in_preview, list_global_rules
forbidden: Telling users to manually look for images in filesystem directories
Direct JSON edits to brain data files (use CLI or MCP)
mistakes: Agents telling users to look in /tmp instead of opening images in Preview
